response.detail:
Deployment failed: (psycopg2.errors.ForeignKeyViolation) insert or update on table "agents" violates foreign key constraint "agents_owner_id_fkey"
DETAIL:  Key (owner_id)=(1) is not present in table "users".

[SQL: INSERT INTO agents (name, description, config, owner_id, is_published, tags, category, version, workspace_id, edge_enabled, resource_priority, performance_rating, execution_count, created_at, updated_at, role, ai_provider, model_name, temperature, tenant_id) VALUES (%(name)s, %(description)s, %(config)s::JSON, %(owner_id)s, %(is_published)s, %(tags)s, %(category)s, %(version)s, %(workspace_id)s, %(edge_enabled)s, %(resource_priority)s, %(performance_rating)s, %(execution_count)s, %(created_at)s, %(updated_at)s, %(role)s, %(ai_provider)s, %(model_name)s, %(temperature)s, %(tenant_id)s) RETURNING agents.id]
[parameters: {'name': 'Customer Support Bot', 'description': 'Handles common customer queries via email', 'config': '{"system_prompt": "You are a polite customer service agent."}', 'owner_id': 1, 'is_published': False, 'tags': 'template:Small Business Starter', 'category': None, 'version': '1.0.0', 'workspace_id': None, 'edge_enabled': False, 'resource_priority': 'normal', 'performance_rating': 0.0, 'execution_count': 0, 'created_at': datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 15, 14, 48, 9, 898347), 'updated_at': datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 15, 14, 48, 9, 898351), 'role': None, 'ai_provider': 'openai', 'model_name': 'gpt-3.5-turbo', 'temperature': 0.7, 'tenant_id': None}]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)
